headline: PGIM Launches Two New Securitized Credit ETFs, Including a AAA-Rated CLO ETF With Core-Like Duration Exposure
summary: NEWARK, N.J., June 11, 2026--Both AAAD and PINC seek to maximize total return through a combination of current income and capital appreciation.
